candidate.description: Coordinator-driven atomic commit across multiple participants: prepare phase collects votes, commit phase finalizes if all voted yes, otherwise abort.

l2s.scope_1line: Blocking atomic commit protocol with prepare and commit phases across participants.
Non-blocking extension of 2PC adding a pre-commit phase.
Coordinated long-running transactions via compensating actions.

l1s.scope_1line: Transactions spanning multiple services or databases.
